creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #3)
> I don't see that line in the patch in bug #279781: https://bz-attachments.freebsd.org/attachment.cgi?id=251495
> 
> Just DISTVERSION and distinfo changes.

The go version it depends on got bumped when updating 7.0.2 in ports bfcf765a321bcf7ed02348a07b6cbcc32987c0b9 , in theory 7.0.4 also needs it.
